message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor black
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor white
  LifeLineBackgroundColor black
  ArrowColor white
  ActorBorderColor white
  ParticipantBorderColor white
  ParticipantBackgroundColor black
  ParticipantFontColor white
  BoxBorderColor white
}

participant "«boundary»\nZMDomačaStran" as ZM #lightblue
participant "«control»\nKrmilnikNovica" as KN #lightgray
participant "«control»\nKrmilnikPredloga" as KP #lightgray
participant "«control»\nKrmilnikDogodek" as KD #lightgray
participant "«entity»\nPredlogProjekta" as PP #lightyellow
participant "«entity»\nNovica" as NO #lightyellow
participant "«boundary»\nSVGoogleCalendar\nAPI" as API #lightblue

[-> ZM
activate ZM

ZM -> KN
activate KN
deactivate KN

ZM -> KP
activate KP
deactivate KP

ZM -> KD
activate KD

KD -> PP
activate PP
deactivate PP

KD -> NO
activate NO
deactivate NO

KD -> API
activate API
deactivate API

KD -> KD
activate KD

KD -> API
activate API
deactivate API

deactivate KD
deactivate KD

deactivate ZM

@enduml
